entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.2
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Void Stranger v0.9.2.2
entry.content:
## What's Changed for v0.9.2.2
## What's Changed * Merge pull request #1 from VirulenceDev/workflow-release-draft by @VirulenceDev in https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/pull/18 * Add itemgroup aliases by @Rooby-Roo in https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/pull/14 * remove unused imports by @Rooby-Roo in https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/pull/15
## New Contributors * @VirulenceDev made their first contribution in https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/pull/18 * @Rooby-Roo made their first contribution in https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/pull/14
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/CriminalPancake/void-stranger-ap/compare/v0.9.2.1...v0.9.2.2

entry.title: YARG v0.0.13
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New:
- Support for the Walter Ralts 01 setlist
## What's Changed * Added Walter Ralts 01 setlist by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/28
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.12...0.0.13

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.4.4
entry.content: Fixes: * Compatibility with AP 0.6.7 * The "BUG: X was a typo" messages for the locations removed in 0.4.3 * The actual typo in the killsanity location in act 2

entry.title: YARGAllSetlists v26.4.9
entry.content:
# All Setlists - Updated to Version 1.3
- Added Walter Ralts 01
### Guitar Hero 1 - no change
### Guitar Hero World Tour - no change
### Rock Band 3 - no change

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.2
entry.content: - Added new Mushroom Grotto map

entry.title: Lethal Company v0.8.0rc1
entry.content:
Mod and apworld: * updated logic for v81
To use this version, navigate to wherever you have this mod installed, delete the old APLC.dll, and replace it with the version attached in this release. r2modman users can find their profile folder by clicking Settings -> Browse profile folder, and Gale users can find it under File -> Open profile folder. From there, navigate to BepInEx/plugins/APLC-APLC and you should see APLC.dll. For users of Gale Mod Manager, it is especially important to DELETE the old dll FIRST to avoid overwriting the mod in other profiles.
This version contains only the minimum changes to make the mod and apworld compatible with Lethal Company v81. The full changes will release at a later date.
**Not compatible with previously generated worlds.**

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.0
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**This version is not compatible with previous versions. If you're in the middle of a game, refrain from updating until you're finished.**
**Changelog:** - Added ways to return to Castle Town mid-run in Chapters 2 and 4 - Added /receive_type to change receiving items between whenever possible and only at the start of the room. - Added /deathlink command to change deathlink during the run - Added /auto_patch steamdepot to look for a steam depot - Added support for no macguffin items - Added Option groups - Customizing filler weights is now possible - Yamlless and out of logic UT Support (no more death on bagel overflow) - Web URI Support - APWorld version displayed in the client window and logs - Added Retry and Quit to the "Please connect to the Multiworld" screen - Removed Randomize Warp Doors - Ralsei no longer telepathically communicates you if you drop the manual while he's absent in Chapter 1 - Fixed the egg notice not working in Chapter 2 - Remote Batteries are no longer called "KeyGen2Segmnt" in Chapter 3 - Having "Starwalker" while recruiting "Elnina" and "Lanino" no longer prevents the checks from sending - "CH3: TV World - Man" is no longer in logic without the TripTicket - Golden Prizes are now properly randomized with "include_hidden_items"
LINUX: If you experience lag, use `/receive_type` to set the receiving items type to "Start of the room". Your lag should decrease next time you enter a room.
**Before starting, use /savereset to reset all AP and save data for this mod. Don't worry; your original DELTARUNE saves won't be affected!**
Feel free to give feedback, and make sure to report any bugs!
**You will only give/receive checks in the Dark World.**

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.3
entry.content: - Ancient Portal moved from Advanced to Intermediate

entry.title: Gauntlet Legends v2.1.5
entry.content:
REQUIRED: Archipelago -> https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases REQUIRED: Retroarch -> https://www.retroarch.com/?page=platforms Drag and drop gl.apworld into your custom_worlds folder in your Archipelago install.
You can launch the client from ArchipelagoLauncher, just click on the Gauntlet Legends Client button.
To patch the game, you are required to have a US copy of Gauntlet Legends for the N64. Either drag the patch onto ArchipelagoLauncher.exe or Right click the patch and 'Open With...' ArchipelagoLauncher.exe The host does not need to have a copy of the game to generate.
RETROARCH IS REQUIRED IT IS THE ONLY EMULATOR THAT WILL WORK.
IN RETROARCH: You must go to Settings->User Interface and turn the Show Advanced Settings ON. Then in Settings-> Network, you must also turn ON Network Commands. Leave the port the default.
Make sure you use Mupen64-plus-next in Retroarch as your core.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/GauntletLegendsAP/compare/v2.1.3...v2.1.5

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.0.7
entry.content:
Changelog
- Removed Unused “Speedrunner Mode” Setting (doesn't do anything, and was replaced by “ShouldHaveBeforeWitherOrDragon” Setting last version) - Smooth Red Sandstone Blocks are now under Exploration option - Modified Some of the default settings to prevent the Archipelago Options Creator from creating the incorrect data type - Dyed Items are now an option for "ExcludedFromItemsanity" - Updated Koala Lib Version (Fixed Crash with Siyntra Connector in Library, so mod can now run on Forge when using Siyntra Connector!) - The Mod Will now check the AP World Version when connecting and inform the player if there's a version mismatch and disconnect rather than crash - Fixed a Crash that could occur when resyncing advancements - Max Advancement Count set to Amount of Advancements in Archipelago Mod, will increase when modded advancements are properly added - Added new goal option for collecting unique items as a goal (It's recommended that the count is set to a high number when using this). This Option can be used on its own, or in addition to other Goals

entry.title: Anodyne v0.6.1
entry.content: - Fixed some logic errors in Apartment, Mountain Cavern and at the Final Gate.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.7.3
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v0.7.x [Setup guide and useful info](https://github.com/DayKat/spirit-tracks/blob/main/worlds/tloz_st/docs/setup.md)
## Bugfixes - Add an attribute to items for “don’t immediately receive that item in theses rooms”, to prevent song statue crashes and more. Some cases were previously hard coded. - added client implementation of goal locations in dungeons cause apparently i forgot that. - made sure Carben restoration song logic didn't bypass boomerang requirement - fixed typos on buried chests - fixed typo on floor number for >elda's spirit flute location - flowcharted Papuzia flags and crash states, and fixed the case family that was probably causing the crashes - fixed invisible Carben crash - added north island sanctuary with song of birds to hard logic - fixed ToS 4 missing whip in logic to reach 15F - fixed some faulty logic in ToS 5 - added entering Mountain Temple from fire source to logic - fixed the hitbox for mountain temple 2f left chest - fixed Goron Village to se cave portal checking the wrong track for access - fixed some faulty flags in Goron Village - fixed Anouki song of discovery chest sometimes not working (was not checking potion slot 2) - tweaked some Kenzo Anouki Village flags

entry.title: Resident Evil 3 Remake v0.2.7
entry.content:
**Quick and dirty release for testing purposes, please report anything to the RE3R thread in Discord.**
**RE2Randomizer features ported over:** ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Enemy kills are now checks/locations, and they work on every difficulty.
Double Weapons / Local Weapons
In-game GUI tooltips when paused/in menu <- Note: Non-RTX only
A more revamped GUI system overall <- Mod menu is a lot more pleasant to look at
The newer "Safe" function, which previously didn't clear the safes off the map when checked now behaves closer to RE2 (the map will clear but the item icon still shows even though it doesn't exist)
**RE3Randomizer specific changes** ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Added "Enemy Behavior"**, which will allow zombies/Nemesis to chase you to the ends of the earth
[SHOCKEEEEEEEEEEERRRRRR](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sMk-HPBF6Mw) - this embodies what will be happening (you're Shocker in this case btw)
No longer requires EMV-Engine/Console, which makes the client much lighter and hopefully less jarring for the end user.
**Fixed a major bug with the Lock Pick** Thanks to everyone who reported this. Previously, if you received the Lock Pick and then saved/quit/died before seeing the Lock Pick cutscene, it could disappear from your inventory. If the game detects that it's missing, it will put a new copy into your ItemBox.
**Jewels and the STARS ID Card are now always local**, these are also required before each area transition where the game would normally stop requiring them **(this prevents players from accidentally disposing of them too early and missing locations later on)**
**And a bunch of smaller bug fixes, including:**
Locker 109 no longer being static due to an item_object issue.
Supply Case now correctly giving Flame Rounds instead of Acid Rounds.
Again, if you're playing on RTX, the fancy new paused/menu GUI features are not available. Those currently only work for non-RTX users.
## What Fuzzy fixed for us behind the scenes because he's goated * Remove likely cause of ImGUI error in recent REF versions by @FuzzyGamesOn in https://github.com/TheRealSolidusSnake/RE3R_AP_Client/pull/7
## What others contributed @RopeyRed - Enemy Kills on all difficulties @Grenier - Strip Scenario/Character out of the client/apworld so it no longer appends (JA) to each location for no reason, now we only append difficulty if not a "Standard" location.

entry.title: Spyro 2 v1.1.3
entry.content:
This release candidate modifies both the client (S2AP.Desktop.exe) and the APWorld. You must update both to use this version.
Please note that this is a test build. It is likely that there are bugs. Please be considerate of the host and your fellow players when using it. For the latest stable build, see https://github.com/Uroogla/S2AP/releases/tag/1.1.1.
New Features: - Trick Logic - Using either presets or by specifying individual tricks, players may tweak game logic to include things like proxies, double jumps, and swimming in air to access areas early. - For the full list of available options, see https://github.com/Uroogla/S2AP/wiki/Tricks-and-Presets - Generic Quality of Life Patch - The client is now capable of producing a modified .cue/.bin that fixes a couple of bugs. - This is not required, and the fixed bugs are very minor (e.g., removes undesirable Elora warps based on talisman count). - This works only from a .cue/.bin dump. - Option to reroute warps to Winter Tundra - When this option is enabled, either opening the door in Winter Tundra or collecting the orb along the wall will change the game such that warps from Crush or Gulp to Winter Tundra redirect to outside Ripto. - This is content cut from the vanilla release. - Add Item Groups (Moneybags Unlocks, Level Unlocks, Gems) and Location Groups (Speedways, Speedway Orbs)
Changes - Split Abilities and Warps option into 2 options - Split Gemsanity Option into 3 (type of checks, location of items, type of items) - Rename "Moneybags Unlock - Door to Aquaria Towers" to "Moneybags Unlock - Wall by Aquaria Towers" - Improve Options Creator user experience - Swim is no longer automatically forced to sphere 1. Some way to leave early Summer Forest will be in logic early based on tricks and settings. - Client Improvements - Save latest successful connect - Inform user on disconnect - Improve readability - Improve command system - use !help to see commands - Implement Received Items tab - Remove spaces around host and slot name (not password!)
Bug Fixes - Fix bug where client could freeze when sending goal - Fix bug where orb and gem requirement for 10 Tokens goal was not enforced - Fix bug where Moneybags items or full gemsanity gems could desync - Fix bug with Easy Bombo where 3 copies appeared at once

entry.title: Pokemon Stadium v0.5.5
entry.content: Bugfix. Set was not being initialized with an iterable.

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v68
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)

entry.title: Buckshot Roulette v0.3.1
entry.content:
## Features - **Consumable Item Randomization** - Item unlocks are shuffled randomly - **Steam Achievements** - Obtain items from completing achievements - **Shotsanity** - Obtain items from successful shots - **Streaksanity** - Obtain items from successful shots on the dealer in a row without being shot yourself - **Customizable Goal** - Choose from one of the following goals: - **70K**: Beat the game - **140K**: Beat 6 Double or Nothing rounds in a row - **1000K**: Cash out in Double or Nothing mode with a score of at least 1 million - **Custom**: Cash out in Double or Nothing mode with a user-specified minimum score - **Consumable Item Logic** - Customize how many consumable are expected to beat a certain number of rounds - **Custom Mechanics** - Unique gameplay features specific to the Archipelago world - **Hint Mode** - Complete rounds and achievements to get hints for locations in other slots in an Archipelago game ## Changelog ### World - Increased the upper point limit for custom goals to one billion ### Client - Fixed bug where the client failed to ignore item debuffs when not included in the player's YAML settings - Fixed the chat log displaying significantly fewer messages than expected during a release/collect - Fixed death link and poison damaging during the final round of the main game - Altered item buffs/debuffs for certain items
| Item | Buff | Debuff | |----------|--------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | Hand Saw | - | Reworked entirely. Now, after firing a shot with the barrel sawed off, all shots the dealer make during their next turn will deal an extra point of damage. | | Beer | Can now only be used once per round. | Additional poison is added when using the buff. The amount of poison depends on the amount of loaded shells when the buff is used. |
## Guides - [Info](<https://github.com/asdfwyay/APBuckshot/blob/dev/worlds/buckshot/docs/en_Buckshot Roulette.md>) - [Setup & Updating](https://github.com/asdfwyay/APBuckshot/blob/dev/worlds/buckshot/docs/setup_en.md)

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v0.3.2
entry.content:
A few qol improvements including the ability to launch the game directly from the client! The client is compatible with v0.3.x generated worlds.
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * Launch from uri: click your slot name on archipelago.gg to open the client directly. * Add button to launch the game * Also usable as a command `/launch` * `/reset_paths` if you want to remove current paths (the client will ask you to locate the files next time launching the game). * Add karts and speed upgrades to status bar * Add icon to the client
## Fixes * Fix typo in difficulty option display name * Improve item box check performance
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v0.3.1...v0.3.2

entry.title: Ape Escape 3 v2.0.5
entry.content: ## Changelog ### Client - Fixed malformation of socket url on Windows when using a non-default port

entry.title: Hunie Pop 2 v3.0.2
entry.content:
- (Client) update Archipelago.MultiClient.Net to fix problem when connecting V3.0.1 Changelog - (Client) fixed processing of "Fruit Seeds" items - (Client) added bunch of debug stuff - (GitHub) added PopTracker to repo and releases V3.0.0 Changelog - (repo) Merged APWorld and Client to one git repository - (APWorld/Client) Added option/logic to randomise girl like/disliked tokens, baggage, unique/shoe gifts - (APWorld) Rebuilt APWorld - (APWorld) Added archipelago.json to APWorld for archipelago 0.7.0 compatibility - (Client) Added BepInEx to zip file for easier installing - (Client) Made arch items in the shop have the archipelago logo - (Client) Removed temp baggage - (Client) Made girl detail screen show what unique/shoe gifts you haven't given yet
BACKUP YOU ORIGINAL SAVE CANT GUARANTEE THAT IT WONT GET CORRUPTED Windows save location: "C:/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/AppData/LocalLow/HuniePot/HuniePop 2 - Double Date/" Mac save location: "/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/Library/Application Support/com.HuniePot.HuniePop2-DoubleDate/" CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop 2 Installed - Download Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop 2 - Double Date.exe" is - play and connect to a Archipelago server APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop 2 APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop 2 APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop 2 YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago PopTracker.zip" into the packs folder in the poptracker install directory

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.0
entry.content: - **Archipelago 0.6.7 is now required** - Weapon Shuffling: - `Wallbuy -` and `Mystery Box -` weapons have now been condensed into a singular `Weapon -` item - The entire Mystery Box contents is used when creating AP items - You can set a certain number of weapons to start unlocked on each map, by strength (Weak to Wonder) - Default is 3 Weak, 2 Decent and 1 Strong weapon per enabled map - This is true for all enabled maps not just your starting map, so you may get more starting unlocks than this if you roll a weapon not available on other enabled maps - New Option `Mystery Box - Expanded Selection` - This will include most non-box weapons on a map into the mystery box rotation - This includes starter pistols, bowie knife, trip mines, special melee weapons from Gorod and Rev etc - Default off - If more than 32 weapons are in the mystery box item pool, you may see some missing weapon visuals when spinning the box without specific weapons unlocked. This is an engine limitation. - Map specific wallbuys has been removed as an option - Apothicon Servant (SoE) and KT-4 (Zetsubou) have been removed as weapon unlocks - At least 1x Perk and 30% of weapons should now appear reliably early in progression - Juggernog should now appear reliably early in progression - Significant changes to most locations access rules / logic - (Modded) Wanted is now fixed. Support is still early but it is playable. - **(New)** Kino der Toten Map Support - Map Checks: - Turn on the Power - Watch a Movie - Launch the Toy Rocket - Music EE - 115 - Der Eisendrache: - Renamed "Map Unlock - Castle" to "Map Unlock - Der Eisendrache" - Gramophone Music EE triggers made slightly larger so they're easier to press - Fix safe code input still being active when restoring after the safe is open - Fix visiting the wrong time travel state when restoring after the safe is open - Zetsubou No Shima: - Basic bucket held is saved and restored (not golden) - Bucket's water level and water type are saved and restored - Make sure Masamune parts require Shield in logic - Gas Mask is logically required for the Easter Egg locations - Revelations: - Fury deaths count towards the mask even when power is not fully restored - Apothigod kills count when the gas is not on - Apothigod and Fury masks are disabled by default due to very significant time requirements - Fix Mask locations not showing properly in Universal Tracker - Deathlink no longer triggers from a delayed Deathlink death. (e.g poor network conditions or the game pausing the script) - Deathlink no longer triggers when exiting via main menu

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.1
entry.content:
## [v1.2.1] - 2026-04-11
### Fixed:
- Fixed logic problem with requirements with multiple SADX players.

entry.title: Vampire Survivors v0.3.2
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Fixed UT variables being swapped (sorry about that) - [ApWorld] Fixed bug with Director goal and being able to 'beat' eudai before you can reach eudai

entry.title: Outer Wilds v1.2.1
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/OuterWildsArchipelagoRandomizer#installation).
- [Updated the Archipelago.MultiClient.Net library to v6.7.1](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1043855558303821844/1484975530968354966). The change most likely to affect players is Berserker's "[Request Datapackage as individual responses](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago.MultiClient.Net/pull/135)", which should help prevent timeout errors when connecting to large multiworlds. - Forgotten Castaways logic fixes from @msyverw: - The "Deep Bramble via Warp Drive" region now logically connects to the (shipless) "Deep Bramble" region, which fixes some cases where the early parts of FC were incorrectly out of logic - Tweaked the regions of "DB Ship Log: Stranded Nomai 5 - Warp" and "FC Ship Log: Bramble's Doorstep 2 - Nomai" so that they won't be in logic until you have logical access to *both* systems, since you can't get a ship log fact for the system you aren't in - In-game tracker now uses the correct logic region for Deep Bramble spawns - The connection from a Deep Bramble spawn to the "Deep Bramble via Warp Drive" region now logically requires only Launch Codes, not Deep Bramble Coordinates as it accidentally used to - "FC Ship Log: Pillar Town 2 - Gift" now logically requires the Expanded Dictionary - Fixed suitless logic by making Nomai shuttle locations require Spacesuit to reach via gravity cannon recalls. Some time ago a base game patch made it no longer possible to move Nomai orbs from inside the ship, which is a problem for suitless players. The only logic this actually broke was entering a Nomai shuttle by recalling it to the corresponding gravity cannon, since you would suffocate while moving the orb to recall it.

entry.title: Mario Kart Wii v0.2.0
entry.content:
## Release Version 0.2.0: Base Track Locking/Unlocks! Yup that's it, after quite a while I crunched a big update out today, it was worth it though. I have one of the most requested features added, **base cup/track unlocks!** there is even more exiting stuff in this update, such as a clear condition rework and several bug fixes.
### How it works **Let me explain how it works**, as it is not perfect yet. I can't visually and functionally block base unlocked cups from being started without patching the rom (which I want to try to avoid as long as possible). So if you try to start a cup you haven't unlocked yet, you'll be sent to a cup in the same Engine Class (cc/mirror) that you DO have unlocked, the cup you're sent to is always the one that has the most possible check completions still available. If there is no cup unlocked in the selected Engine Class you will be sent to the cup, however you will not be able to complete laps and thus will not be able to complete the race. For VS Race, you have the tracks unlocked for the cup (per cc) you have unlocked, trying to launch a VS Race will send you into the race without being able to complete laps. When starting an Archipelago of this game you will by default start with 2 unlocked cups, I heavily recommend using the included tracker to see this, the cups page will now also show what cups are unlocked. One cup will be in 50cc and the other 100cc so you need to use both karts and bikes, if you have either 50cc or/and 100cc disabled, your 2 cups will be unlocked for the lowest available Engine Class.
### Changelog: - Added base cup/track unlocks. - Added cup unlock tracking in cups page in tracker. - Reworked clear condition/completion system: each goal cup will now award a 'Victory Trophy' when you have as many Victory Trophies as assigned in your YAML you will complete your AP. - Added option to hide your AP ip and port in the tracker. - Removed Dolphin Auto Launch as it was causing too many issues.
**REQUIRES A NEW APWORLD, ANY PREVIOUS APWORLD VERSION WILL NOT WORK!**
_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.1.1-h3...v0.2.0

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v69
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)

entry.title: System Shock 2 v0.5.0
entry.content:
Elite enemies added, they have bonus health and various perks to spice things up. Art codes can now be randomized across the lower decks. New victory options of getting to the Richenbacker or Many levels. Psi pull now works. Items are now auto picked up. New location map icons and icons for unchecked but possible code art.
Make sure to update both the apworld and ss2 mod. Don't update midrun and remake your yaml.

entry.title: Pokemon Stadium v0.5.6
entry.content: Adds a 3rd victory condition: clear Rival fight and both Master Ball Cups.

entry.title: Super Mario Sunshine v0.6.0
entry.content: # What's new * Difficulty options have been added ranging from Hard, Advanced and Salty Tears * Two new options added, one to unlock all Episodes and another to add Nozzle Boxes to the randomization pool * Client updated as to not require your YAML for the Tracker and a new tab that shows your current Blues, Shines and Tickets (If in Ticket Mode) * Sunshine now has a neat little icon in the AP Launcher! * The naming scheme for the checks have been changed to better reflect when each location is actually obtainable. This is mostly for the blue coins and the earliest possible moments they can be acquired in a vanilla setting

entry.title: The Messenger v0.6.7
entry.content: This alternate version of the The Messenger apworld has integration for portal and transition shuffle with [Universal Tracker](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1367270230635839539). In bonus, it tracks glitched logic and has a PopTracker integration, to follow where you are and which checks are available on your second monitor! ## Changelog - Support PopTracker map support to the UT integration - Add glitched logic to the UT integration - Fix UT not loading when portal shuffle is disabled - Fix UT not loading when transition shuffle are decoupled - Fix connection plando not modifying the connections (only for seeds generated with this apworld) Compatible with games generated with [Archipelago 0.6.7](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7) ## Installation Instructions (for Windows, but likely compatible with other systems) - Install Archipelago (link below) with the generator enabled. - Place the new `messenger.apworld` file in your custom world folder. - Remove the old `messenger.apworld` file from your `lib/worlds` folder. - When connecting to a _The Messenger_ seed with UT, you will be prompted to locate a The Messenger Track Pack (downloadable [here](https://github.com/alwaysintreble/TheMessengerTrackPack/releases)). Dismiss the prompt if you do not wish to use the map. If needed, you can change the location in your `host.yaml` in your Archipelago installation. ## Troubleshooting - Make sure you removed your `messenger.apworld` from `lib/worlds` and added the new apworld in `custom_worlds` - Report any issue in the [_#messenger_](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1090822939697500243) channel in the Archipelago discord. Make sure to ping @jouramie otherwise I won't read. ## We Need Your Help! If you'd like to help integrate this into the main Archipelago releases, drop a comment on one of the pull requests. https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/pull/6030 https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/pull/6132! :wink: Also, please mention in the [_#messenger_](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1090822939697500243) channel that you used it, and report any issue. This will help with the integration process if some player mention using the beta world!

entry.title: Universal Tracker v0.2.28
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Persist ignore and manually collect commands by @drtchops in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/118 * Adds glitched logic to get_logical_path and the explain and get_logical_path overrides (forgot about explain more, if anybody is actually using it i'll add it later) * fixed the bug qwint added that broke back compat, so we should work back all the way to kivyMD again
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/compare/Tracker_v0.2.27...Tracker_v0.2.28

entry.title: YARGAllSetlists v26.4.12
entry.content:
# All Setlists - Updated to Version 1.4 - Added LEGO Rock Band - Oye Mi Amor has been made part of the main Rock Band 3 setlist instead of its own setlist.
### Guitar Hero 1 - no change ### Guitar Hero World Tour - no change # Rock Band 3 - Updated to Version 1.3 - Oye Mi Amor has been made part of the main Rock Band 3 setlist instead of its own setlist.
# LEGO Rock Band - Initial Release - Supports Guitar, Bass, Drums, and Vocals - 45 songs total

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.4.0
entry.content:
Mod update only, Apworld is unchanged
- Added archipelago password support - Because the password field cannot be completely empty after being set once, you must tick `Use Password` to connect to a passworded server - Added clientside Deathlink toggle - This allows disabling Deathlink on a Deathlink gen - This **does not** allow enabling Deathlink on a non-Deathlink gen - Fixed controller navigation on the Checks tab - Archipelago Shop added to Kino der Toten

entry.title: Super Mario Sunshine v0.6.1
entry.content: * Changed client to properly recognize ticket mode and apply the correct flags * Changed some logic rules for entrances to account for different difficulties

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.1
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**Changelog:** - Fixed bug where the glitch used to obtain the ThornRing check early was disabled - Fixed bug where setting "include_t_rank" to "excluded from logic" would still remove the location - Fixed bug where the /recieve_type would crash the client if you weren't already connected - Added a notice if your save folder path doesn't exist
LINUX: If you experience lag, use `/receive_type` to set the receiving items type to "Start of the room". Your lag should decrease next time you enter a room. Also, for right now you do have to set the savepath every time the client is restarted. Hopefully next update will change this.
**Before starting, use /savereset to reset all AP and save data for this mod. Don't worry; your original DELTARUNE saves won't be affected!**
Feel free to give feedback, and make sure to report any bugs!
**You will only give/receive checks in the Dark World.**

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.3
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.3
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Resident Evil 7 v1.0.0
entry.content: Added Regions connection (the apworld should gen now? For testing purpose)

entry.title: Resident Evil 7 v1.0.0
entry.content:
# The Shipwreck Update !
The Shipwreck has been added, with it, the actual ending of the game is now randomized ! Hooray ! Only the "present" part is randomized, the "past" one isn't.
## Bugs : Fixed the issue were the first chapters item were not sending correctly Fixed some item location naming that were unclear (still in progress, if you have better name i'm all ears)
## Warning : This is the first step for an possible 1.0, there will still be possible issue with the game softlocking itself if you go out of logic, and other issue that could occure
Please send any bugs you find on the channel, that really helps 👍

entry.title: Super Mario Sunshine v0.6.2
entry.content: Quick fix for logic bug that considered game beatable right off the bat

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.3
entry.content:
# Changelog
Since [5.4.2](https://github.com/gerbiljames/Archipelago-Crystal/releases/tag/5.4.2)
## Bug Fixes - Fix the rivals starter having its vanilla moveset if starters were random but not learnsets or trainer Pokemon. - Fix gym clears sometimes being double counted if remote items were on. - Ice Path B3F no longer logically provides Rock Smash encounters. - Trainer Pokemon can no longer have duplicate moves.
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0 or later. Some fixes are retroactive, re-patch your ROM to benefit from them._
